Package com.sunilos.p4.rest

Class BaseRestController<B extends BaseBean,M extends BaseModel>

java.lang.Object
jakarta.servlet.GenericServlet
jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
com.sunilos.p4.rest.BaseRestController<B,M>
Type Parameters:
B -
M -
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.servlet.Servlet, jakarta.servlet.ServletConfig, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
RoleRestCtl, UserRestCtl
public abstract class BaseRestController<B extends BaseBean,M extends BaseModel> extends jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
URLs HTTP GET rest/userctl/get/1 HTTP GET rest/userctl/delete/1 HTTP POST rest/userctl/save HTTP POST rest/userctl/add HTTP POST rest/userctl/update HTTP POST rest/userctl/search
Author:
Deepak Vishwakarma
